name: Zolai Grammar Checker
goal: Validate Zolai sentences against ZVS Tedim standard, check word usage and context, and verify via Gemini API
validation_steps: 3. Phonology — no ti cluster, no c+a/e/o/aw
5. Negative conditional — nong pai kei a leh, never lo leh
9. Gemini API — fluency, context, word choice, natural flow
10. Return structured result with all issues and corrected form

known_corrections.sia_vs_siat: sia = damaged/partial; siat = completely destroyed — check context
known_corrections.semsem_vs_zawzaw: semsem = more and more; zawzaw = comparatively more (a gol zawzaw)
known_corrections.roof: innkhum or sikkang — NOT inn tungpuan
known_corrections.directions_east: zingsang lam = east (NOT morning in direction context)
known_corrections.directions_west: nitang lam = west (NOT evening in direction context)
known_corrections.directions_south: vaang lam nung = south (NOT nisatna lam)
known_corrections.plural_i: I pai hi (correct) — I pai uh hi (WRONG)
known_corrections.negative_conditional: nong pai kei a leh (correct) — nong pai lo leh (WRONG)
known_corrections.ti_cluster: ti cluster does not exist in Zolai

gemini_validation.prompt_template: You are a Tedim Zolai (Chin language) expert. Validate this sentence: '{sentence}'. Check: (1) ZVS Tedim dialect only (pasian not pathian, gam not ram), (2) SOV word order, (3) natural word choice and flow, (4) correct particles, (5) correct word meanings (sia=damaged not destroyed, semsem=more and more not zawzaw, innkhum=roof not inn tungpuan). Return JSON: { valid: bool, issues: [string], corrected: string, explanation: string }
gemini_validation.on_failure: return issues list with corrected form — never silently pass
